title: HexThings
description: An addon for Hex Casting that adds a few patterns I would find useful
body:
This mod is a collection of additional patterns for the Hex Casting mod that I wanted to see in the base mod.

[Online Hexdocs](https://real-septicake.github.io/HexThings/v/latest/main/en_us/)

Adds:
- Patience
  - A no-op pattern inteded for use as a placeholder
- Flattening Exaltation
  - A pattern that replaces an element of a list with the contents of another
- Shard Reflection
  - A pattern allowing you to check the current status of your sentinel
- Introjection and Retrojection
  - Patterns allowing for pattern evaluation within a Introspection-Retrospection pair
- Key-Value Dictionaries, alongside patterns for manipulating them
  - Supports most iota types as keys, and all as values
- Advanced list manipulation patterns allowing for finer control over lists
